titlestmt.titleproper: Cornell University School of Civil and Environmental Engineering records16-4-23

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2023-03-31 23:04:49 UTC.

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Cornell University School of Civil and Environmental Engineering records

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: Cornell University. College of Civil Engineering

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Correspondence and circular letters surrounding the search for a new Dean or Director for the College of Civil Engineering. Correspondents include Cornell University President Jacob Gould Schurman, Robert H. Thurston, Frank S. Washburn, R. H. Treman, Charles D. Marx, Walter C. Kerr, and many others.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Cornell University School of Civil and Environmental Engineering records #16-4-23. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Annual reports are restricted to permission of the office of origin.

relatedmaterial.head: Related Materials
relatedmaterial.p: For additional material relating to the Cornell University College of Engineering summer surveying camp see collection #16-4-956.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Box 12 is restricted to permission of the office of origin until 2062.

controlaccess.subject: Engineering schools -- New York (State) -- Ithaca -- Administration.
controlaccess.corpname: Cornell University. College of Civil Engineering -- : Administration.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes reports for Department of Structural Engineering

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Access restricted to the permission of the office of origin.

scopecontent.p: Handwritten notes on pad paper; letter from President Clifford F. Evans ('53) of The Henderson Corporation to Dean William B. Streett; CEE Advisory Council; research expenditures notes; memos

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes memos

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes memos; announcement of the appointment of Leslie Banks-Sills as the Mary Shepard B. Upson Visiting Professor

scopecontent.p: Includes notes on Post-Its; 1997/1998 Annual Report was finalized February 1999; memos

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes draft and original copy of report; 1998/1999 Annual Report finalized April 2000

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Faculty meeting minutes restricted to permission of Office of Origin until 2062.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes students of all years

did.unittitle: Department of Environmental Engineering - Five-Year Plan
School of Civil and Environmental Engineering (CEE) - Materials for External Review Committee (1 of 3)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: CEE School overview and attachments

did.unittitle: School of Civil and Environmental Engineering (CEE) - Materials for External Review Committee (2 of 3)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: CEE School overview; attachments include faculty biographies, faculty awards and honors, CEE Strategic Plan, CEE Advisory Council Members, ASCE Chapter Community Service Projects and Awards, student honors and awards, research activities, faculty publications, faculty consulting, faculty professional committee service

did.unittitle: School of Civil and Environmental Engineering (CEE) - Materials for External Review Committee (3 of 3)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Attachments include engineering subgroup descriptions; student handbooks

did.unittitle: Engineering Opportunities, Outreach, and Future Needs

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Some programs include corrections or comments; undated historical comment

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Some programs include corrections or comments

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Some programs include corrections or comments; degree summary dated June 14, 1967; handwritten notes

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Some annotations

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes memorandum for reorganization of engineering colleges; mini brochure for Civil Engineering School Summer Survey camp; property surveys drafts with annotations; six-year calendar (1954-1960); envelope for Cornell University Messenger Service; hand-drawn blueprints

did.unittitle: Questions for Examination in R.R. Surveying

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This examination was found in a book from the estate of the late Professor H.N. Ogden, probably given by Professor C.L. Crandall; annotations on the back

scopecontent.p: From the Department of Theoretical and Applied Mechanics, University of Illinois

did.unittitle: Material from U.S. Lake Survey Office - War Department

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Correspondence; hand-drawn sketch of the Triangulation from The line Seneca R-Seneca P to Watkins and Ithaca; data tables

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes hand-drawn table of information for each organization; list of requested and returned photos; lists of photographs; hand-drawn blueprint of The American Coliseum

scopecontent.p: Students are in alphabetical order by last name; includes classes and grades for each year, date of birth, entrance subjects, and name of father or guardian

scopecontent.p: Includes National Academy of Engineering (NAE) Memorial Statement; Engineering Cornell Quarterly: Autumn 1980; newspaper articles

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes photos

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photo negatives of White-Hollister bridge (June 1980); event photos; photos of Dean Hollister; correspondence; newspaper articles; program for Chi Epsilon Fraternity Initiation; The Cornell Engineer booklet

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photos of family members, self-portraits, campus, labs, other faculty

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Correspondence; course descriptions/information

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Book of students, alumni, faculty members, and others associated with the school whose family and friends made contributions to the School of Civil Engineering in their honor; includes photos of graduating classes (1932-1950); includes draft of tribute to Professor L. Hewitt
